hero.description: Batch extract URLs, verify link availability, smart filter, multi-format export. Runs entirely on the client — your data stays secure.

input.file_drag_hint: Drag & drop files, or click to upload
input.file_formats: Supports TXT, JSON, MD, HTML, XML, CSV, JS, TS, JSX, TSX

features.title: Powerful & Simple
features.description: From extraction to verification to export — all link operations in one place. Fully client-side, your data stays safe.

items.title: Batch URL Extraction
items.description: Automatically identify and extract all links from plain text and multiple file formats (TXT, JSON, MD, HTML, CSV, etc.).

items.title: Link Validation
items.description: Concurrently check each link's availability with 5 threads, auto-detect success, failure, timeout status with HTTP status codes and page titles.

items.title: Multiple Export Formats
items.description: Export results in TXT, JSON, or CSV format for data analysis, documentation, reporting and other scenarios.

items.title: Privacy First
items.description: Runs entirely on the client — all data is processed in your browser, nothing is uploaded to any server.

items.title: Smart Filtering
items.description: Quickly filter links by status: all, valid, invalid, pending. Pinpoint problematic links efficiently.

items.title: Re-verification
items.description: Re-check individual failed or timed-out links without re-extracting everything — save time while pinpointing issues.

how_it_works.title: Three Steps to Extract Links
how_it_works.description: No registration, no installation — just open your browser and go

steps.title: Paste or Upload
steps.description: Paste text containing links or upload files in TXT, JSON, HTML, or other formats. All URLs are auto-detected.

steps.title: Extract & Verify
steps.description: Batch extract all URLs in one click. Click "Check All" to verify link availability with status codes and page titles.

steps.title: Filter & Export
steps.description: Filter links by status, copy to clipboard, or export as TXT, JSON, or CSV to suit your needs.

items.quote: The batch link verification feature is incredibly useful — no more manually checking each link. JSON export directly feeds into my data analysis workflow. Work efficiency has improved significantly.
items.author: Alex Turner

items.quote: I frequently check outbound links for SEO optimization. This tool runs entirely client-side, so no data leakage concerns. Clean UI, powerful features.
items.author: Marcus Johnson

items.quote: Drag and drop log files to extract all links, with comprehensive multi-format export. As a data analyst, this tool has become essential in my daily workflow.
items.author: Sophie Chen

final_cta.title: Start Extracting Links Now
final_cta.description: No registration, no download — just open your browser. All data processed locally, safe and reliable.
